Internal Audit Note — Negative Confirmations

To: Audit Committee
Date: 24 May 2026

For the relevant audit period, confirm the following:

Cross-border: Personal data was not transferred outside Singapore. Without any
standard contractual clauses in place, the contemplated US flow was paused.

Consent / DSR: The subject did not withdraw consent during the period. No DSAR was
received via the privacy portal. There is no erasure request pending for this tenant
at this time.

Minimisation: No data minimisation review has been undertaken this cycle. There is no
over-collection by the new endpoint.
